sentence: 请到一楼总台办理入住手续。
pinyin: Qǐng dào yī lóu zǒngtái bànlǐ rùzhù shǒuxù.
english: Please go to the front desk on the first floor to check in.

sentence: 这道等式两边必须相等。
pinyin: Zhè dào děngshì liǎng biān bìxū xiāngděng.
english: Both sides of this equation must be equal.

meaning: 1. to make an issue of sth; 2. to fuss; 3. to make a song and dance
sentence: 他总喜欢拿小事做文章，让人烦透了。
pinyin: Tā zǒng xǐhuān ná xiǎoshì zuò wénzhāng, ràng rén fán tòu le.
english: He always likes to make an issue out of small things, which drives everyone crazy.

sentence: 公司招募了一批年轻的科技人员来做研发。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhāomù le yī pī niánqīng de kējì rényuán lái zuò yánfā.
english: The company recruited a group of young technical staff for research and development.

sentence: 这款产品符合国际技术标准，可以出口。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn fúhé guójì jìshù biāozhǔn, kěyǐ chūkǒu.
english: This product meets international technology standards and can be exported.
